code: const API_URL='http://localhost:5000';export const getAvailableDates=async()=>{const res=await fetch(`${API_URL}/available-dates`);return res.json();};export const createBooking=async(date,email)=>{const res=await fetch(`${API_URL}/bookings`,{method:'POST',headers:{'Content-Type':'application/json'},body:JSON.stringify({date,userEmail:email})});return res.json();};
